title: Google Gemma 4 Runs Natively on iPhone with Full Offline AI Inference
title_zh: 谷歌Gemma 4可在iPhone上原生运行 实现完全离线AI推理
summary_zh: 谷歌近日宣布其轻量级开源大语言模型Gemma 4现已能在iPhone上原生运行，并支持完全离线的AI推理。这一突破性进展意味着用户无需连接互联网，即可在本地设备上直接利用Gemma 4模型处理各类任务，显著提升了隐私性、响应速度和使用的便捷性。，该实现的核心在于对模型进行了深度优化，使其能够高效利用iPhone的硬件资源，特别是神经处理单元（NPU）和GPU。通过先进的模型压缩与量化技术，Gemma 4在保持较高性能的同时，大幅降低了计算和内存需求，从而成功部署到移动端。开发者可以通过特定的机器学习框架（如Core ML）将模型集成到iOS应用中，为用户提供无缝的离线AI体验。，Gemma 4本身是一个参数规模相对较小的开源LLM，由谷歌基于其研发Gemini模型的技术构建。它专为在资源受限的环境（如个人电脑和移动设备）中高效运行而设计。此次在iPhone上实现原生离线推理，进一步拓展了其应用场景。用户可以在没有网络连接的情况下，进行文本生成、问答、内容摘要、代码编写辅助等多种AI任务，所有数据处理均在设备本地完成，有效保障了数据隐私和安全。，这一技术进展为移动AI应用开发开辟了新的可能性。它降低了开发者集成先进AI功能的门槛，使得更多应用能够内置强大的离线语言模型功能。对于用户而言，这代表了一种更快速、更私密且不受网络环境限制的AI交互方式。预计这将推动一批新型离线AI应用的出现，特别是在注重即时响应和数据安全的领域。

title: Claude Code Routines
content: Automate work with routines - Claude Code Docs Skip to main content Claude Code Docs home page English Search... ⌘ K Ask AI Search... Navigation Claude Code on the web Automate work with routines Getting started Build with Claude Code Deployment Administration Configuration Reference Agent SDK What's New Resources Getting started Overview Quickstart Changelog Core concepts How Claude Code works Extend Claude Code Explore the .claude directory Explore the context window Use Claude Code Store instructions and memories Permission modes Common workflows Best practices Platforms and integrations Overview Remote Control Claude Code on the web Get started Reference Routines Plan in the cloud Claude Code on desktop Chrome extension (beta) Computer use (preview) Visual Studio Code JetBrains IDEs Code review & CI/CD Claude Code in Slack On this page Example use cases Create a routine Create from the web Create from the CLI Create from the Desktop app Configure triggers Add a schedule trigger Add an API trigger Trigger a routine API reference Add a GitHub trigger Supported events Filter pull requests How sessions map to events Manage routines View and interact with runs Edit and control routines Repositories and branch permissions Connectors Environments Usage and limits Related resources Routines are in research preview. Behavior, limits, and the API surface may change. A routine is a saved Claude Code configuration: a prompt, one or more repositories, and a set of connectors , packaged once and run automatically. Routines execute on Anthropic-managed cloud infrastructure, so they keep working when your laptop is closed. Each routine can have one or more triggers attached to it: Scheduled : run on a recurring cadence like hourly, nightly, or weekly API : trigger on demand by sending an HTTP POST to a per-routine endpoint with a bearer token GitHub : run automatically in response to repository events such as pull requests or releases A single routine can combine triggers. For example, a PR review routine can run nightly, trigger from a deploy script, and also react to every new PR. Routines are available on Pro, Max, Team, and Enterprise plans with Claude Code on the web enabled. Create and manage them at claude.ai/code/routines , or from the CLI with /schedule . This page covers creating a routine, configuring each trigger type, managing runs, and how usage limits apply. ​ Example use cases Each example pairs a trigger type with the kind of work routines are suited to: unattended, repeatable, and tied to a clear outcome. Backlog maintenance. A schedule trigger runs every weeknight against your issue tracker via a connector. The routine reads issues opened since the last run, applies labels, assigns owners based on the area of code referenced, and posts a summary to Slack so the team starts the day with a groomed queue. Alert triage. Your monitoring tool calls the routine’s API endpoint when an error threshold is crossed, passing the alert body as text . Th
summary_zh: Claude Code推出Routines功能，用户可通过保存的配置实现工作流程自动化。该功能目前处于研究预览阶段，其行为、限制和API接口可能发生变化。，核心功能上，Routine是一个打包好的Claude Code配置，包含提示词、一个或多个代码仓库以及一组连接器。其关键特点是能在Anthropic管理的云基础设施上执行，即使用户关闭笔记本电脑也能持续运行。，Routines支持三种触发方式：计划任务（可按小时、每日或每周等周期运行）、API触发（通过向专属端点发送HTTP POST请求手动触发）以及GitHub触发（在响应代码仓库事件如拉取请求或发布时自动运行）。用户可以为单个Routine组合多种触发器。，该功能适用于Pro、Max、Team和Enterprise计划且已启用网页版Claude Code的用户。管理入口位于claude.ai/code/routines，也可通过CLI使用/schedule命令进行操作。，典型应用场景包括：利用计划触发器每晚自动维护问题 backlog，通过连接器读取问题跟踪系统，自动分配标签和负责人，并将摘要发送至Slack；或通过API触发器实现告警分诊，当监控工具触发错误阈值时自动调用Routine进行分析处理。，技术实现上，Routines通过预定义的配置和触发器，将AI能力无缝集成到开发运维工作流中，实现了无人值守、可重复且目标明确的自动化任务执行。

title: Turn your best AI prompts into one-click tools in Chrome
content: Turn your best AI prompts into one-click tools in Chrome Turn your best AI prompts into one-click tools in Chrome Apr 14, 2026 · Share x.com Facebook LinkedIn Mail Copy link Skills in Chrome let you discover, save and remix AI workflows — and repeat them instantly. Hafsah Ismail Product Manager, Chrome Share x.com Facebook LinkedIn Mail Copy link Sorry, your browser doesn't support embedded videos, but don't worry, you can download it and watch it with your favorite video player! People are using AI in Chrome to help them get more done on the web — whether that’s answering questions, comparing information or clarifying concepts. Until now, repeating an AI task — like asking for ingredient substitutions to make a recipe vegan — meant re-entering the same prompt as you visited different pages. To make this easier, we’re launching Skills in Chrome, which lets you save and reuse your most helpful AI prompts and run them with a single click. Build your own one-click workflows When you write a prompt that you’ll want to use again, you can save it as a Skill directly from your chat history. The next time you need it, select your saved Skill in Gemini in Chrome by typing forward slash ( / ) or clicking the plus sign ( + ) button, and your Skill will run on the page you’re viewing, along with any other tabs you select. You can edit your saved Skills and create new ones at any time. Early testers have used Skills in Chrome to create personalized and powerful workflows for a wide range of tasks. Here are just a few examples. Health & Wellness: quickly calculating protein macros for any recipe Shopping: generating side-by-side spec comparisons across multiple tabs Productivity: scanning lengthy documents for important information Get started with our Skills library We’re also launching a library of ready-to-use Skills for common tasks and workflows. Want to break down the ingredients of a product you’re viewing online? Or select the perfect gift from multiple options by cross-referencing your budget with the recipient’s interests? We wrote Skills that do these things and more. If you find one that looks interesting, you can add it as a saved Skill and give it a try. And if you want to customize it to better fit your needs, you can edit the Skill and update the prompt. Stay in control Skills are built on Chrome’s foundation of security and privacy, and they utilize the same safeguards we apply to prompts in Gemini in Chrome. That means a Skills prompt will ask for confirmation before taking certain actions, such as adding an event to your calendar or sending an email. And Skills benefit from Chrome’s layered protections, including automated red-teaming and auto-update capabilities. Starting today, we’re rolling out Skills to Gemini in Chrome on 1 , helping you streamline your AI-powered browsing. Your saved Skills are available on any signed-in Chrome desktop device and can be managed by typing forward slash ( / ) in Gemini in Chrome and then clicking the com
title_zh: 将最佳AI提示转化为Chrome一键工具
summary_zh: 谷歌Chrome浏览器推出名为“Skills”的新功能，允许用户将常用的AI提示词（prompt）转化为一键式工具，从而简化重复性AI任务的操作流程。该功能现已集成至Chrome内置的Gemini AI助手。，核心功能在于，用户可将日常浏览中反复使用的有效提示词（例如查询食谱素食替代方案、对比商品规格或总结长文档）保存为自定义“Skill”。之后，在任何网页中只需通过输入斜杠（/）或点击加号（+）按钮即可快速调用该Skill，AI将基于当前页面及所选标签页内容自动执行任务。用户可随时编辑或创建新的Skill。，该功能旨在提升浏览效率，早期测试者已将其应用于健康（快速计算食谱蛋白质宏量）、购物（多标签页商品规格对比）及生产力（从长文档提取关键信息）等多种场景。同时，谷歌提供了预置Skill库，包含针对常见任务（如在线解析产品成分、根据预算和兴趣筛选礼物）的即用型工作流，用户可直接添加或按需修改。，在隐私与安全方面，Skills基于Chrome的安全架构开发，继承了Gemini在Chrome中的相同保护措施，例如在执行添加日历事件或发送邮件等操作前需用户确认，并受益于自动化红队测试、自动更新等多层防护。，该功能即日起面向桌面版Chrome用户逐步推送，用户登录后可在所有已登录设备间同步和管理已保存的Skills。

title: What Claude Code's Source Revealed About AI Engineering Culture
content: Claude Code's Source: 3,167-Line Function, Regex Sentiment From the Trenches Subscribe Sign in The Snake That Ate Itself: What Claude Code’s Source Revealed About AI Engineering Culture Denis Stetskov Apr 01, 2026 766 152 151 Share On December 27, 2025, Anthropic’s lead engineer Boris Cherny posted on X: “In the last thirty days, 100% of my contributions to Claude Code were written by Claude Code.” 259 pull requests. 497 commits. 40,000 lines added. 1.3 million views. The tech world applauded. Three months later, a packaging mistake exposed 512,000 lines of that code to the public. Leaks happen. Companies recover. The leak isn’t the story. The code is the story. 64,464 lines of core TypeScript serving paying customers. A single function spanning 3,167 lines. Regex for sentiment analysis at a company that builds the world’s most advanced language model. A known bug burning 250,000 API calls daily, documented in a comment and shipped anyway. Anthropic responded to the leak. Packaging error. Human mistake. No one fired . They never responded to the code. Because the leak was an accident. The code was a choice. The Auction Nobody Won To understand what happened, you need to watch the numbers climb. March 2025. CEO Dario Amodei at the Council on Foreign Relations : “We’re 3 to 6 months from a world where AI is writing 90% of the code.” May 2025. Boris Cherny on the Latent Space podcast: “Maybe 80-90% Claude-written code overall.” September 2025. Amodei again, hedging now: “70, 80, 90% of the code written at Anthropic is written by Claude.” Notice the range. 70 is not 90. But journalists ran with 90. October 2025. Amodei at Dreamforce with Marc Benioff: “I made this prediction that in six months, 90% of code would be written by AI models. That is absolutely true now.” When Benioff pressed, Amodei walked it back: “Not uniformly.” December 2025. Cherny’s tweet. 100%. February 2026. CPO Mike Krieger at Cisco AI Summit : “Right now for most products at Anthropic, it’s effectively 100%.” March 7, 2026. Cherny confirmed again: “Claude Code is 100% written by Claude Code.” March 31, 2026. The source map leaked. Every two to three months, the number went up like a bidding war where the bidder is also the auctioneer. A LessWrong analysis later called these claims “misleading/hype-y,” noting the metrics were never defined. Is it 90% of lines committed? 90% of engineering effort? 90% of characters typed? The distinction matters enormously. Anthropic never clarified. The ambiguity was the point. What 100% Looks Like in Practice So the number reached 100%. Then the source leaked. And for the first time, anyone could see what 100% actually produced. A file called print.ts contained a single function spanning 3,167 lines with 486 branch points and 12 levels of nesting. One HN commenter catalogued what lived inside that function: the agent run loop, SIGINT handling, rate limiting, AWS authentication, MCP lifecycle management, plugin loading, team-lead polling via a wh
title_zh: Claude代码开源揭示了AI工程文化的哪些秘密
summary_zh: 2025年12月27日，Anthropic首席工程师Boris Cherny在X平台宣称，过去30天内其对Claude Code项目的全部贡献均由Claude Code自身完成，涉及259个pull request、497次提交和4万行新增代码。这一声明引发技术界广泛关注。然而三个月后，因打包失误导致51.2万行源代码泄露，意外揭示了AI工程实践背后的真实图景。，泄露的核心代码库包含64,464行TypeScript代码，其中暴露出多个值得深思的技术现象：一个名为print.ts的文件中存在长达3,167行的巨型函数，包含486个分支点和12层嵌套结构；在拥有世界顶尖语言模型技术的公司中，竟使用正则表达式进行情感分析；更存在一个已知缺陷每日消耗25万次API调用，却仅以注释标注并直接投入生产。Anthropic官方仅将事件归因为打包失误，未对代码质量本身作出回应。，回溯事件背景，自2025年3月起Anthropic高管层持续释放AI编码占比的激进预测：CEO Dario Amodei从“3-6个月内AI将编写90%代码”逐步调整为“70-90%”，最终CPO Mike Krieger在2026年2月宣称“多数产品已实现100%”。这些未明确定义统计口径的声明被分析机构评为“误导性宣传”。当源代码真正曝光后，业界得以审视100%AI编码的实际产出——巨型函数、非常规技术方案与已知缺陷的并存，折射出AI工程文化中追求宣传效应与工程严谨性之间的张力。此次泄露虽属意外，但其展露的代码质量与宣传叙事间的落差，引发了关于AI辅助开发成熟度与伦理边界的重要讨论。

title: Show HN: LangAlpha – what if Claude Code was built for Wall Street?
content: GitHub - ginlix-ai/LangAlpha: Claude Code for Finance · GitHub Skip to content You signed in with another tab or window. Reload to refresh your session. You signed out in another tab or window. Reload to refresh your session. You switched accounts on another tab or window. Reload to refresh your session. Dismiss alert ginlix-ai / LangAlpha Public Notifications You must be signed in to change notification settings Fork 100 Star 687 main Branches Tags Go to file Code Open more actions menu Folders and files Name Name Last commit message Last commit date Latest commit History 1,160 Commits 1,160 Commits .github .github deploy deploy docs docs libs/ ptc-cli libs/ ptc-cli mcp_servers mcp_servers migrations migrations scripts scripts skills skills src src tests tests web web .dockerignore .dockerignore .env.example .env.example .gitattributes .gitattributes .gitignore .gitignore CLAUDE.md CLAUDE.md CONTRIBUTING.md CONTRIBUTING.md Dockerfile.sandbox Dockerfile.sandbox LICENSE LICENSE Makefile Makefile README.md README.md agent_config.yaml agent_config.yaml alembic.ini alembic.ini config.yaml config.yaml docker-compose.yml docker-compose.yml pyproject.toml pyproject.toml server.py server.py uv.lock uv.lock View all files Repository files navigation A vibe investing agent harness LangAlpha is built to help interpret financial markets and support investment decisions. Note Gemini 3 Hackathon — If you're a judge or reviewer for the Gemini 3 Hackathon , please refer to the hackathon/gemini-3 branch for the frozen submission. This main branch contains ongoing development beyond the submission. Getting Started • API Docs • Agent Core • Backend • Web • TUI • Skills • MCP langalpha-demo.mp4 Activated with a skill, the agent dispatches parallel subagents to gather market data, news, and macro context, then presents a morning note with inline interactive visualizations. Why LangAlpha Every AI finance tool today treats investing as one-shot: ask a question, get an answer, move on. But real investing is Bayesian — you start with a thesis, new data arrives daily, and you update your conviction accordingly. It's an iterative process that unfolds over weeks and months: refining theses, revisiting positions, layering new analysis on top of old. No single prompt captures that. From vibe coding to vibe investing Inspired by software engineering: a codebase persists, and every commit builds on what came before. Code agent harnesses like Claude Code and OpenCode succeeded by building agents that embrace this pattern, exploring existing context and building on prior work. LangAlpha brings that same insight: give the agent a persistent workspace, and research naturally compounds. In practice, you create a workspace per research goal ("Q2 rebalance", "data center demand deep dive", "energy sector rotation"). The agent interviews you about your goals and style, produces its first deliverable, and saves everything to the workspace filesystem. Come back tomorrow and your files, t
title_zh: Show HN：LangAlpha——如果Claude Code是为华尔街打造的会怎样？
summary_zh: LangAlpha是一个专为金融投资领域设计的AI智能体平台，其核心理念是“将Claude Code的模式引入华尔街”。它旨在帮助用户解读金融市场并支持投资决策，将投资过程从一个简单的问答互动，转变为一个持续迭代、基于贝叶斯更新的研究流程。，与当前大多数将投资视为一次性问答的AI金融工具不同，LangAlpha认为真实的投资是一个持续数周甚至数月的迭代过程：用户从初始论点出发，每日获取新数据，并据此更新判断。该平台从Claude Code、OpenCode等代码智能体平台获得灵感，将软件工程中“代码库持久存在，每次提交都基于先前工作”的模式应用于金融研究。，LangAlpha的核心功能是为智能体提供一个持久化的工作空间，使研究成果能够自然积累。在实践中，用户可以为每个研究目标（如“Q2资产再平衡”、“数据中心需求深度研究”）创建一个独立的工作空间。智能体会与用户沟通其投资目标和风格，生成初步的研究成果，并将所有内容保存到工作空间的文件系统中。用户次日返回时，所有文件、对话历史和智能体状态都得以保留，研究可以在此基础上继续进行。，平台通过激活特定技能，智能体可以调度并行的子智能体来收集市场数据、新闻和宏观背景信息，最终生成一份包含内嵌交互式可视化的晨报。其架构包含Agent Core、Backend、Web界面、终端用户界面（TUI）、技能库以及对MCP（Model Context Protocol）的支持。，该项目最初作为Gemini 3 Hackathon的参赛作品提交，目前的主分支已包含超越原始提交的持续开发内容。LangAlpha通过模拟真实、动态的投资研究过程，为金融专业人士提供了一个能够积累知识、支持长期决策的AI辅助工具。

title: AgentFM – A single Go binary that turns idle GPUs into a P2P AI grid
content: GitHub - Agent-FM/agentfm-core: AgentFM is a peer-to-peer network that turns everyday computers into a decentralized AI supercomputer. AgentFM lets you run massive AI workloads directly across a global mesh of idle CPUs and GPUs. · GitHub Skip to content You signed in with another tab or window. Reload to refresh your session. You signed out in another tab or window. Reload to refresh your session. You switched accounts on another tab or window. Reload to refresh your session. Dismiss alert Agent-FM / agentfm-core Public Notifications You must be signed in to change notification settings Fork 2 Star 17 main Branches Tags Go to file Code Open more actions menu Folders and files Name Name Last commit message Last commit date Latest commit History 59 Commits 59 Commits .github/ ISSUE_TEMPLATE .github/ ISSUE_TEMPLATE agent-example agent-example agentfm-go agentfm-go agentfm-python agentfm-python assets assets .gitignore .gitignore CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md CONTRIBUTING.md CONTRIBUTING.md LICENSE LICENSE README.md README.md SECURITY.md SECURITY.md View all files Repository files navigation AgentFM turns idle hardware into a secure, decentralized AI supercomputer. Zero-config P2P networking • Hardware-aware routing • Live artifact streaming 🌐 https://agentfm.net ⚡ Quick Install curl -fsSL https://api.agentfm.net/install.sh | bash AgentFM is a peer-to-peer network that turns everyday computers into a decentralized AI supercomputer. Instead of paying exorbitant fees to centralized monopolies like AWS or OpenAI, AgentFM lets you run massive AI workloads directly across a global mesh of idle CPUs and GPUs. 🌍 Join the Public Mesh: Package your custom AI agent, whether it is a local LLM, a Python script, or an image generator, into a standard Podman container and broadcast it. Anyone on the internet can securely connect to use your agent, and you can instantly route your heavy AI tasks to available GPUs across the globe. 🔒 Create a Private Swarm: Working on confidential enterprise data? Use a secret swarm.key to create a closed, heavily encrypted "Darknet." Safely offload heavy tasks from a weak laptop to a co-worker's powerful GPU workstation in another country, without exposing a single byte of data to the public internet. 📑 Table of Contents ✨ Core Features ⚡ Installation ⚙️ CLI Reference 🛠️ How to Use AgentFM 🤖 Headless API Gateway 📡 Inside the Boss UI 🏗️ Architecture & Philosophy ✨ Core Features 🌐 Zero-Config P2P Networking (Omni-Dialer): Instantly punches through strict NATs, corporate firewalls, and home routers using libp2p AutoNAT, Kademlia DHT routing (Global WAN), mDNS (Local LAN), and Circuit Relay v2 fallbacks. 🔒 Ephemeral Sandboxing & Artifact Routing: Executes untrusted AI agents inside isolated, daemonless Podman containers. Every task spins up a unique container that is instantly destroyed upon completion, automatically zipping and streaming any generated files (like images or CSVs) securely back to the Boss node. ⚖️ GossipSub Lo
title_zh: AgentFM——单一Go二进制文件将闲置GPU转化为P2P人工智能网格
summary_zh: AgentFM是一个基于Go语言编写的单一二进制文件，它能够将闲置的GPU资源转化为一个点对点（P2P）的AI计算网格。该项目旨在构建一个去中心化的AI超级计算机网络，让日常计算机通过P2P网络连接起来，直接在全球范围内的闲置CPU和GPU上运行大规模的AI工作负载，从而避免依赖AWS或OpenAI等中心化服务商的高昂费用。，其核心功能包括：零配置P2P网络（Omni-Dialer），利用libp2p AutoNAT、Kademlia DHT（广域网）、mDNS（局域网）和Circuit Relay v2等技术，自动穿透严格的NAT、企业防火墙和家庭路由器，实现节点间的直接连接。临时沙盒与工件路由功能，将不受信任的AI代理（如本地LLM、Python脚本或图像生成器）打包到标准的Podman容器中，在隔离的无守护进程环境中执行；每个任务都会启动一个独立的容器，任务完成后立即销毁，并自动将生成的任何文件安全地流式传输回Boss节点。用户可以通过公开网格共享自定义AI代理，或使用密钥创建私有群组，形成一个加密的“暗网”，以便在企业保密数据场景中，安全地将重型任务从性能不足的笔记本电脑卸载到全球同事的强大GPU工作站上，而无需将任何数据暴露在公共互联网中。，项目提供了快速安装脚本、CLI工具、无头API网关和Boss UI界面，支持用户轻松部署和管理去中心化的AI计算资源。其架构强调安全性与去中心化，通过GossipSub等协议实现高效的网络通信，为运行AI工作负载提供了一个灵活、经济且安全的替代方案。

title: Show HN: Kelet – Root Cause Analysis agent for your LLM apps
content: Find and Fix AI Agent & LLM App Failures — Automatically | Kelet | Kelet Free during launch Debugging your agent in prod shouldn't require a crystal ball. Kelet tracks down production failures in LLM apps and AI agents. It finds the root cause and hands you the fix. You just ship. Book a demo Connect your agent → No credit card required. Connect your first agent in 5 minutes. Works with OpenTelemetry Langfuse Mixpanel OpenAI Anthropic LangChain pydantic AI SDK CrewAI Strands Agno Mastra PostHog OpenTelemetry Langfuse Mixpanel OpenAI Anthropic LangChain pydantic AI SDK CrewAI Strands Agno Mastra PostHog OpenTelemetry Langfuse Mixpanel OpenAI Anthropic LangChain pydantic AI SDK CrewAI Strands Agno Mastra PostHog console.kelet.ai Dashboard Open issues, agent health, and AI-generated brief at a glance. Issues Every failure pattern classified, with evidence and a prompt patch ready to ship. Sessions Inspect any trace. See exactly which step broke, and why. Open issues, agent health, and AI-generated brief at a glance. Every failure pattern classified, with evidence and a prompt patch ready to ship. Inspect any trace. See exactly which step broke, and why. Trusted by world-class AI engineering teams · live in production 33K+ Sessions analyzed. Failures found. Production AI agents. Not demos. Across design partner deployments 73% of teams had failures nobody noticed. Kelet did. Of pilot cohort — before any synthetic signals were configured 14.3 min Median · from trace ingestion to prompt patch Root Cause Analysis (RCA) + fix. No guesses. Evidence-backed. Sound familiar? Your agent fails. You scroll traces. You guess a fix. Repeat. That's 30% of your engineering week. Another dashboard won't fix that. Kelet actually investigates. Constantly. How it works We collect your traces and signals. Connect to your agent's stack in minutes. Every agent interaction, signal, and user feedback flows in automatically. Know exactly why your agent failed. Kelet reads every trace so you don't have to. Root causes surface in minutes, backed by evidence — not gut feeling. Ship the fix. Know it held. From root cause to prompt patch — with before/after reliability measurements. Kelet runs the patch against real sessions and shows you the before/after. No more flying blind after a deploy. // Every mistake becomes a lesson. Automatically. CONTINUOUS LEARNING Collect traces & signals Investigate root cause Fix with proof it held FAQ Common questions What does Kelet actually do? Kelet reads your production AI agent traces and signals, clusters failure patterns across thousands of sessions, and surfaces root causes with evidence — so you ship fixes instead of hypotheses. Think of it as a detective that investigates every failure automatically. What kinds of AI agents and LLM applications does Kelet work with? Any agent or LLM application where you own the code — agentic loops, multi-step workflows, RAG pipelines, chatbots, autonomous agents. If you built it and you ship it, Kelet
title_zh: Show HN：Kelet——专为LLM应用设计的根因分析智能体
summary_zh: Kelet是一款面向LLM应用与AI Agent的根因分析智能体，旨在自动发现并修复生产环境中的故障。该工具通过连接用户现有的技术栈（如OpenTelemetry、Langfuse、OpenAI、Anthropic、LangChain、CrewAI等），在五分钟内即可完成接入，自动采集追踪数据、交互信号与用户反馈。，其核心功能包括：仪表板总览问题状态与智能体健康度；问题面板对故障模式进行分类，并提供证据与可立即部署的提示补丁；会话追踪功能可深入检查任意调用链，精准定位故障环节与原因。Kelet采用证据驱动的根因分析机制，能够自动聚类海量会话中的故障模式，平均仅需14.3分钟即可从数据采集生成修复方案，并基于真实会话验证补丁的有效性，提供修复前后的可靠性对比。，该平台已在实际生产环境中分析超过3.3万次会话，其试点部署数据显示，73%的团队曾存在未被察觉的故障，而Kelet成功将其识别。它适用于各类自研的LLM应用场景，包括智能体循环、多步骤工作流、RAG管道、聊天机器人及自主智能体等，帮助工程团队将故障排查时间从传统的猜测性调试转变为自动化、可验证的修复流程，从而提升部署信心与系统稳定性。

title: forrestchang/andrej-karpathy-skills - A single CLAUDE.md file to improve Claude Code behavior, derived from Andrej Karpathy's observations on LLM coding pitfalls.
content: GitHub - forrestchang/andrej-karpathy-skills: A single CLAUDE.md file to improve Claude Code behavior, derived from Andrej Karpathy's observations on LLM coding pitfalls. · GitHub Skip to content You signed in with another tab or window. Reload to refresh your session. You signed out in another tab or window. Reload to refresh your session. You switched accounts on another tab or window. Reload to refresh your session. Dismiss alert forrestchang / andrej-karpathy-skills Public Notifications You must be signed in to change notification settings Fork 3.2k Star 39.5k main Branches Tags Go to file Code Open more actions menu Folders and files Name Name Last commit message Last commit date Latest commit History 22 Commits 22 Commits .claude-plugin .claude-plugin skills/ karpathy-guidelines skills/ karpathy-guidelines CLAUDE.md CLAUDE.md EXAMPLES.md EXAMPLES.md README.md README.md View all files Repository files navigation Karpathy-Inspired Claude Code Guidelines Looking for a managed agents platform? Check out Multica — an open-source platform for running and managing coding agents with reusable skills. A single CLAUDE.md file to improve Claude Code behavior, derived from Andrej Karpathy's observations on LLM coding pitfalls. The Problems From Andrej's post: "The models make wrong assumptions on your behalf and just run along with them without checking. They don't manage their confusion, don't seek clarifications, don't surface inconsistencies, don't present tradeoffs, don't push back when they should." "They really like to overcomplicate code and APIs, bloat abstractions, don't clean up dead code... implement a bloated construction over 1000 lines when 100 would do." "They still sometimes change/remove comments and code they don't sufficiently understand as side effects, even if orthogonal to the task." The Solution Four principles in one file that directly address these issues: Principle Addresses Think Before Coding Wrong assumptions, hidden confusion, missing tradeoffs Simplicity First Overcomplication, bloated abstractions Surgical Changes Orthogonal edits, touching code you shouldn't Goal-Driven Execution Leverage through tests-first, verifiable success criteria The Four Principles in Detail 1. Think Before Coding Don't assume. Don't hide confusion. Surface tradeoffs. LLMs often pick an interpretation silently and run with it. This principle forces explicit reasoning: State assumptions explicitly — If uncertain, ask rather than guess Present multiple interpretations — Don't pick silently when ambiguity exists Push back when warranted — If a simpler approach exists, say so Stop when confused — Name what's unclear and ask for clarification 2. Simplicity First Minimum code that solves the problem. Nothing speculative. Combat the tendency toward overengineering: No features beyond what was asked No abstractions for single-use code No "flexibility" or "configurability" that wasn't requested No error handling for impossible scenarios If 200 lines coul
title_zh: forrestchang/andrej-karpathy-skills - 一个单独的CLAUDE.md文件，用于改进Claude代码行为，源自Andrej Karpathy对LLM编码陷阱的观察。
summary_zh: GitHub用户forrestchang创建了一个名为"andrej-karpathy-skills"的项目，其核心是一个单独的CLAUDE.md文件，旨在优化Claude Code（Anthropic的AI编程助手）的行为。该项目灵感来源于AI研究员Andrej Karpathy对大型语言模型（LLM）在编程任务中常见缺陷的观察。，Karpathy指出LLM在编码时存在几个关键问题：模型会基于错误假设自行推进而不验证；不善于管理困惑、寻求澄清、揭示不一致性、呈现方案权衡或在必要时提出异议；倾向于过度复杂化代码和API，引入臃肿的抽象层，不清理无效代码，可能用上千行代码实现一个本可用百行完成的功能；有时甚至会作为副作用修改或删除它们未能充分理解的注释或代码。，该项目提出的解决方案将这些洞见浓缩为四项核心原则，并集成在一个CLAUDE.md文件中，以直接指导Claude Code的行为：，1. 先思考后编码：针对错误假设和隐藏困惑。要求模型明确陈述假设，在不确定时主动提问而非猜测；当存在歧义时，呈现多种解释而非 silently 选择；在存在更简单方案时提出异议；当感到困惑时，明确指出不清楚之处并请求澄清。，2. 简洁至上：针对过度复杂化和抽象膨胀。倡导用最少的代码解决问题，杜绝 speculative 功能。具体要求包括：不添加未要求的功能；不为单次使用的代码创建抽象；不引入未请求的“灵活性”或“可配置性”；不为不可能发生的场景添加错误处理。，3. 精准修改：针对无关的编辑和误触不应更改的代码。强调修改应严格限定于任务范围，避免产生副作用。在修改代码前，需先理解其上下文和目的。，4. 目标驱动执行：旨在通过测试优先和可验证的成功标准来提升效率。鼓励在编写实现代码前先定义测试或验证方法，确保工作聚焦于达成明确、可检验的目标。，该项目将这些原则具体化为可操作的提示指令，供用户在Claude Code中调用。项目仓库还包含示例文件（EXAMPLES.md）和技能目录（skills/），展示了如何应用这些指南。开发者forrestchang同时推荐了开源平台Multica，用于运行和管理具备可复用技能的编程智能体。该项目的价值在于将专家对LLM编码弱点的分析转化为一套实用、可部署的指导方针，旨在使AI编程助手的行为更加审慎、清晰和高效。

title_zh: Claude代码插件claude-mem：自动记录编程会话中Claude的所有操作，通过AI（使用Claude的agent-sdk）压缩信息，并将相关上下文注入未来会话。
summary_zh: GitHub项目thedotmack/claude-mem是一个为Claude Code设计的插件，旨在为AI编程助手提供持久的记忆压缩系统。该插件能够自动捕获用户在编码会话中与Claude交互的所有操作，利用AI技术（基于Claude的agent-sdk）对这些内容进行压缩和语义总结，并将相关的上下文信息智能地注入到未来的会话中。其核心价值在于打破单次会话的局限，使Claude能够跨会话保持对项目历史、决策和进度的连续性认知，从而显著提升协作效率和上下文感知能力。，项目通过自动记录工具使用观察、生成语义摘要并使其在后续会话中可用，实现了无缝的上下文保存。用户安装后，重启Claude Code或Gemini CLI，以往会话的上下文便会自动出现在新会话中。安装过程简便，支持多种方式：可通过单行命令`npx claude-mem install`安装，或针对Gemini CLI（自动检测`~/.gemini`）、OpenCode等不同IDE环境进行指定安装，也可直接在Claude Code的插件市场中搜索添加。，该系统的技术细节包括利用agent-sdk进行AI驱动的压缩与摘要生成，确保存储高效且信息相关。它本质上构建了一个智能的RAG（检索增强生成）式记忆层，使得Claude在回答新问题时能动态参考历史交互，减少重复解释，维持对话连贯性。项目文件结构包含插件配置、规则定义、源代码及测试等，支持多语言文档。目前已在GitHub上获得大量关注，体现了开发者对增强AI编程助手长期记忆功能的迫切需求。

The goal of this project is to explore the use of AI to make trading decisions. This project is for educational purposes only and is not intended for real trading or investment. This system employs several agents working together: Aswath Damodaran Agent - The Dean of Valuation, focuses on story, numbers, and disciplined valuation Ben Graham Agent - The godfather of value investing, only buys hidden gems with a margin of safety Bill Ackman Agent - An activist investor, takes bold positions and pushes for change Cathie Wood Agent - The queen of growth investing, believes in the power of innovation and disruption Charlie Munger Agent - Warren Buffett's partner, only buys wonderful businesses at fair prices Michael Burry Agent - The Big Short contrarian who hunts for deep value Mohnish Pabrai Agent - The Dhandho investor, who looks for doubles at low risk Nassim Taleb Agent - The Black Swan risk analyst, focuses on tail risk, antifragility, and asymmetric payoffs Peter Lynch Agent - Practical investor who seeks "ten-baggers" in everyday businesses Phil Fisher Agent - Meticulous growth investor who uses deep "scuttlebutt" research Rakesh Jhunjhunwala Agent - The Big Bull of India Stanley Druckenmiller Agent - Macro legend who hunts for asymmetric opportunities with growth potential Warren Buffett Agent - The oracle of Omaha, seeks wonderful companies at a fair price Valuation Agent - Calculates the intrinsic value of a stock and generates trading signals Sentiment Agent - Analyzes market sentiment and generates trading signals Fundamentals Agent - Analyzes fundamental data and generates trading signals Technicals Agent - Analyzes technical indicators and generates trading signals Risk Manager - Calculates risk metrics and sets position limits Portfolio Manager - Makes final trading decisions and generates orders Note: the system does not actually make any trades. Disclaimer This project is for educational and research purposes only . Not intended for real trading or investment No investment advice or
title_zh: Virattt/AI对冲基金 - 一支AI对冲基金团队
summary_zh: GitHub项目“virattt/ai-hedge-fund”是一个概念验证性质的AI对冲基金系统。该项目旨在探索利用人工智能进行交易决策，但仅用于教育研究目的，不涉及真实交易或投资建议。，该系统的核心是一个由多个专业AI智能体（Agent）协同工作的框架，每个智能体模拟一位著名投资大师的风格与策略，共同分析并生成交易信号。主要智能体及其角色包括：，- 估值与基本面分析智能体：如Aswath Damodaran Agent（专注于叙事、数据和估值）、Ben Graham Agent（价值投资）、Phil Fisher Agent（增长型深度研究）和Valuation Agent（计算股票内在价值）。，- 风格策略智能体：如Cathie Wood Agent（增长与颠覆性创新）、Charlie Munger Agent（以合理价格投资优质企业）、Peter Lynch Agent（寻找“十倍股”）、Michael Burry Agent（逆向深度价值投资）和Rakesh Jhunjhunwala Agent（印度市场多头策略）。，- 宏观与风险管理智能体：如Stanley Druckenmiller Agent（宏观不对称机会）、Nassim Taleb Agent（黑天鹅尾部风险与反脆弱性）、Bill Ackman Agent（激进投资）以及Risk Manager（计算风险指标并设置头寸限制）。，- 市场分析智能体：包括Sentiment Agent（分析市场情绪）、Fundamentals Agent（分析基本面数据）和Technicals Agent（分析技术指标）。，所有智能体的分析结果最终由Portfolio Manager（投资组合经理）进行综合，做出最终交易决策并生成指令。项目强调这是一个模拟系统，不会执行真实交易。其技术架构包含完整的代码目录（app, src, tests等）、Docker支持以及Poetry依赖管理，为开发者提供了一个研究多智能体AI在金融决策中应用的实验平台。

title: lsdefine/GenericAgent - Self-evolving agent: grows skill tree from 3.3K-line seed, achieving full system control with 6x less token consumption
content: GitHub - lsdefine/GenericAgent: Self-evolving agent: grows skill tree from 3.3K-line seed, achieving full system control with 6x less token consumption · GitHub Skip to content You signed in with another tab or window. Reload to refresh your session. You signed out in another tab or window. Reload to refresh your session. You switched accounts on another tab or window. Reload to refresh your session. Dismiss alert lsdefine / GenericAgent Public Notifications You must be signed in to change notification settings Fork 220 Star 1.6k main Branches Tags Go to file Code Open more actions menu Folders and files Name Name Last commit message Last commit date Latest commit History 340 Commits 340 Commits assets assets frontends frontends memory memory reflect reflect tests tests .gitignore .gitignore GETTING_STARTED.md GETTING_STARTED.md LICENSE LICENSE README.md README.md TMWebDriver.py TMWebDriver.py agent_loop.py agent_loop.py agentmain.py agentmain.py ga.py ga.py hub.pyw hub.pyw launch.pyw launch.pyw llmcore.py llmcore.py mykey_template.py mykey_template.py simphtml.py simphtml.py View all files Repository files navigation English | 中文 🌟 Overview GenericAgent is a minimal, self-evolving autonomous agent framework. Its core is just ~3K lines of code . Through 9 atomic tools + a ~100-line Agent Loop , it grants any LLM system-level control over a local computer — covering browser, terminal, filesystem, keyboard/mouse input, screen vision, and mobile devices (ADB). Its design philosophy: don't preload skills — evolve them. Every time GenericAgent solves a new task, it automatically crystallizes the execution path into an skill for direct reuse later. The longer you use it, the more skills accumulate — forming a skill tree that belongs entirely to you, grown from 3K lines of seed code. 🤖 Self-Bootstrap Proof — Everything in this repository, from installing Git and running git init to every commit message, was completed autonomously by GenericAgent. The author never opened a terminal once. 📋 Core Features Self-Evolving : Automatically crystallizes each task into an skill. Capabilities grow with every use, forming your personal skill tree. Minimal Architecture : ~3K lines of core code. Agent Loop is ~100 lines. No complex dependencies, zero deployment overhead. Strong Execution : Injects into a real browser (preserving login sessions). 9 atomic tools take direct control of the system. High Compatibility : Supports Claude / Gemini / Kimi / MiniMax and other major models. Cross-platform. 🧬 Self-Evolution Mechanism This is what fundamentally distinguishes GenericAgent from every other agent framework. [New Task] --> [Autonomous Exploration] (install deps, write scripts, debug & verify) --> [Crystallize Execution Path into skill] --> [Write to Memory Layer] --> [Direct Recall on Next Similar Task] What you say What the agent does the first time Every time after "Read my WeChat messages" Install deps → reverse DB → write read script → save skill one-line invoke
title_zh: lsdefine/GenericAgent - 自进化智能体：从3300行种子代码生长技能树，以6倍更低令牌消耗实现全系统控制
summary_zh: GitHub项目lsdefine/GenericAgent是一个极简、自进化的自主智能体框架。其核心代码仅约3300行，通过9个原子工具和约100行的Agent Loop，使任何LLM都能获得对本地计算机的系统级控制，覆盖浏览器、终端、文件系统、键盘/鼠标输入、屏幕视觉以及移动设备（通过ADB）。其设计理念是“不预载技能，而是进化技能”：每次解决新任务时，框架会自动将执行路径结晶化为一项可复用的技能。随着使用时间增长，技能不断积累，形成完全属于用户的个人技能树，这一切都从3300行的种子代码生长而来。，项目的一个关键自举证明是，其仓库中的所有操作——从安装Git、运行git init到每次提交信息——均由GenericAgent自主完成，作者未曾手动打开终端。，核心特性包括：自进化能力，自动将任务转化为技能，能力随使用增长；极简架构，核心代码量小，Agent Loop约100行，无复杂依赖，零部署开销；强大的执行能力，可注入真实浏览器（保持登录会话），9个原子工具直接控制系统；高兼容性，支持Claude、Gemini、Kimi、MiniMax等主流模型，且跨平台运行。，其自进化机制是区别于其他智能体框架的根本：面对新任务时，智能体进行自主探索（安装依赖、编写脚本、调试验证），随后将成功的执行路径结晶化为技能，写入记忆层。当未来遇到类似任务时，可直接调用该技能，从而大幅提升效率。例如，首次执行“读取微信消息”任务需要一系列复杂操作，而此后只需一行调用即可完成。这种机制据称能以减少6倍的token消耗实现完整的系统控制。

title: google/magika - Fast and accurate AI powered file content types detection
content: GitHub - google/magika: Fast and accurate AI powered file content types detection · GitHub Skip to content You signed in with another tab or window. Reload to refresh your session. You signed out in another tab or window. Reload to refresh your session. You switched accounts on another tab or window. Reload to refresh your session. Dismiss alert google / magika Public Notifications You must be signed in to change notification settings Fork 699 Star 13.4k main Branches Tags Go to file Code Open more actions menu Folders and files Name Name Last commit message Last commit date Latest commit History 1,726 Commits 1,726 Commits .cargo .cargo .gemini .gemini .github .github assets assets docs docs go go js js python python rust rust tests_data tests_data website-ng website-ng website website .dockerignore .dockerignore .gitattributes .gitattributes .gitignore .gitignore CITATION.cff CITATION.cff CONTRIBUTING.md CONTRIBUTING.md Dockerfile Dockerfile LICENSE LICENSE README.md README.md dist-workspace.toml dist-workspace.toml View all files Repository files navigation Magika Magika is a novel AI-powered file type detection tool that relies on the recent advance of deep learning to provide accurate detection. Under the hood, Magika employs a custom, highly optimized model that only weighs about a few MBs, and enables precise file identification within milliseconds, even when running on a single CPU. Magika has been trained and evaluated on a dataset of ~100M samples across 200+ content types (covering both binary and textual file formats), and it achieves an average ~99% accuracy on our test set. Here is an example of what Magika command line output looks like: Magika is used at scale to help improve Google users' safety by routing Gmail, Drive, and Safe Browsing files to the proper security and content policy scanners, processing hundreds billions samples on a weekly basis. Magika has also been integrated with VirusTotal ( example ) and abuse.ch ( example ). For more context you can read our initial announcement post on Google's OSS blog , you can consult Magika's website , and you can read more in our research paper , published at the IEEE/ACM International Conference on Software Engineering (ICSE) 2025. You can try Magika without installing anything by using our web demo , which runs locally in your browser! Highlights Available as a command line tool written in Rust, a Python API, and additional bindings for Rust, JavaScript/TypeScript (with an experimental npm package, which powers our web demo ), and GoLang (WIP). Trained and evaluated on a dataset of ~100M files across 200+ content types . On our test set, Magika achieves ~99% average precision and recall, outperforming existing approaches -- especially on textual content types. After the model is loaded (which is a one-off overhead), the inference time is about 5ms per file, even when run on a single CPU. You can invoke Magika with even thousands of files at the same time. You can also use -r for
title_zh: 谷歌/Magika - 快速精准的AI驱动文件内容类型检测工具
summary_zh: Google开源了Magika，这是一个基于AI的快速准确文件内容类型检测工具。它利用深度学习技术，通过一个高度优化的定制模型实现精确识别，该模型仅重约几MB，即使在单CPU上运行也能在毫秒级别完成文件识别。，Magika在包含200多种内容类型（涵盖二进制和文本文件格式）的约1亿个样本数据集上进行了训练和评估，在测试集上平均准确率约为99%。该工具在Google内部已大规模应用，通过将Gmail、Drive和Safe Browsing中的文件路由到相应的安全和内容策略扫描器，每周处理数千亿个样本，以提升用户安全性。此外，Magika也已集成到VirusTotal和abuse.ch等平台。，项目提供多种使用方式：包括用Rust编写的命令行工具、Python API，以及针对Rust、JavaScript/TypeScript（提供实验性npm包，支持其Web演示）和GoLang（开发中）的绑定。其核心优势在于：在模型加载后（一次性开销），每个文件的推理时间仅约5毫秒，且可同时处理数千个文件。尤其在对文本内容类型的检测上，Magika的表现优于现有方法。，用户无需安装即可通过浏览器本地运行的Web演示进行体验。更多技术细节可参考Google开源博客的公告、项目网站，以及发表在2025年IEEE/ACM国际软件工程会议（ICSE）上的研究论文。

title: Donchitos/Claude-Code-Game-Studios - Turn Claude Code into a full game dev studio — 49 AI agents, 72 workflow skills, and a complete coordination system mirroring real studio hierarchy.
content: GitHub - Donchitos/Claude-Code-Game-Studios: Turn Claude Code into a full game dev studio — 49 AI agents, 72 workflow skills, and a complete coordination system mirroring real studio hierarchy. · GitHub Skip to content You signed in with another tab or window. Reload to refresh your session. You signed out in another tab or window. Reload to refresh your session. You switched accounts on another tab or window. Reload to refresh your session. Dismiss alert Donchitos / Claude-Code-Game-Studios Public template Uh oh! There was an error while loading. Please reload this page . Notifications You must be signed in to change notification settings Fork 1.5k Star 9.9k main Branches Tags Go to file Code Open more actions menu Folders and files Name Name Last commit message Last commit date Latest commit History 33 Commits 33 Commits .claude .claude .github .github CCGS Skill Testing Framework CCGS Skill Testing Framework design design docs docs production/ session-state production/ session-state src src .gitignore .gitignore CLAUDE.md CLAUDE.md LICENSE LICENSE README.md README.md UPGRADING.md UPGRADING.md View all files Repository files navigation Claude Code Game Studios Turn a single Claude Code session into a full game development studio. 49 agents. 72 skills. One coordinated AI team. Why This Exists Building a game solo with AI is powerful — but a single chat session has no structure. No one stops you from hardcoding magic numbers, skipping design docs, or writing spaghetti code. There's no QA pass, no design review, no one asking "does this actually fit the game's vision?" Claude Code Game Studios solves this by giving your AI session the structure of a real studio. Instead of one general-purpose assistant, you get 49 specialized agents organized into a studio hierarchy — directors who guard the vision, department leads who own their domains, and specialists who do the hands-on work. Each agent has defined responsibilities, escalation paths, and quality gates. The result: you still make every decision, but now you have a team that asks the right questions, catches mistakes early, and keeps your project organized from first brainstorm to launch. Table of Contents What's Included Studio Hierarchy Slash Commands Getting Started Upgrading Project Structure How It Works Design Philosophy Customization Platform Support Community Supporting This Project License What's Included Category Count Description Agents 49 Specialized subagents across design, programming, art, audio, narrative, QA, and production Skills 72 Slash commands for every workflow phase ( /start , /design-system , /create-epics , /create-stories , /dev-story , /story-done , etc.) Hooks 12 Automated validation on commits, pushes, asset changes, session lifecycle, agent audit trail, and gap detection Rules 11 Path-scoped coding standards enforced when editing gameplay, engine, AI, UI, network code, and more Templates 39 Document templates for GDDs, UX specs, ADRs, sprint plans, HUD design, acce
title_zh: Donchitos/Claude-Code-Game-Studios - 将Claude代码转化为完整游戏开发工作室：49个AI智能体、72项工作流技能，以及模拟真实工作室层级的完整协作系统。
summary_zh: GitHub项目“Claude-Code-Game-Studios”旨在将单个Claude Code会话转化为一个完整的游戏开发工作室。该项目通过模拟真实游戏工作室的层级结构，构建了一个由49个专门化AI智能体、72个工作流技能以及完整协调系统组成的AI团队。，核心功能与特点包括：1. 结构化开发流程：项目解决了单一AI会话缺乏结构的问题，通过引入设计评审、质量保证（QA）环节和愿景监督，防止出现硬编码魔法数字、跳过设计文档或编写混乱代码的情况。2. 层级化智能体系统：49个智能体被组织成类似真实工作室的层级，包括守护项目愿景的总监、负责各领域（设计、编程、美术、音频、叙事、QA、制作等）的部门主管以及执行具体工作的专家。每个智能体都有明确的职责、升级路径和质量关卡。3. 丰富的工作流技能：提供了72个斜杠命令（如 /start, /design-system, /create-epics, /dev-story 等），覆盖从启动、设计系统、创建史诗/用户故事、开发到完成故事等全工作流程阶段。4. 自动化与规范保障：包含12个自动化钩子，用于在提交、推送、资源变更、会话生命周期等节点进行验证；以及11条路径限定编码规则，在编辑游戏逻辑、引擎、AI、UI、网络代码等时强制执行标准。5. 完备的文档模板：提供39个文档模板，用于游戏设计文档（GDD）、UX规格、架构决策记录（ADR）、冲刺计划、HUD设计等。，该系统的设计哲学是让开发者保留所有决策权，同时拥有一个能提出正确问题、及早发现错误、并从头脑风暴到发布全程保持项目条理的AI团队。项目支持自定义，并提供了详细的入门、升级指南和项目结构说明。

title: Claude may require identity verification in some cases
content: Identity verification on Claude | Claude Help Center Skip to main content Identity verification on Claude Updated yesterday Table of contents Being responsible with powerful technology starts with knowing who is using it. Identity verification helps us prevent abuse, enforce our usage policies, and comply with legal obligations. We are rolling out identity verification for a few use cases, and you might see a verification prompt when accessing certain capabilities, as part of our routine platform integrity checks, or other safety and compliance measures. We only use your verification data to confirm who you are and not for any other purposes. How are we verifying? We selected Persona Identities as our verification partner based on the strength of their technology, privacy controls, and security safeguards. Follow the steps below to complete your identity verification process. What you'll need Before you start, have these ready: A valid government-issued photo ID : the physical document, in hand A phone or a computer with a camera : you may be asked to take a live selfie with your phone, or your webcam A few minutes : verification typically takes under five minutes Accepted ID types We accept original, physical government-issued photo IDs from most countries. Common examples include: Passport Driver's license or state/provincial ID card National identity card Your ID must be issued by a government, clearly legible, undamaged, and include a photo of you. We do not accept: Photocopies, screenshots, scans, or photos of a photo Digital or mobile IDs (such as mobile driver's licenses) Non-government IDs: student IDs, employee badges, library cards, bank cards Temporary paper IDs How your data is protected We know that handing over an ID is a meaningful ask, and we've designed this process to protect your information at every step. Anthropic is the data controller for your verification data. That means we set the rules for how it's used and how long it's kept. Persona processes it on our behalf, under our instructions. Your ID and selfie are collected and held by Persona, not on Anthropic's systems. Anthropic can access verification records through Persona's platform when needed—for example, to review an appeal—but we don't copy or store those images ourselves. Persona is contractually limited in how they can use your data: only to provide and support verification and to improve their ability to prevent fraud. They're bound to protect it with industry-standard security controls and delete it in line with the retention limits we've set and applicable law. All data passing through and to Persona is encrypted in transit and at rest. For full details on how we handle personal data, see our Privacy Policy . What we're not doing We are not using your identity data to train our models. Verification data is used solely to confirm who you are and to meet our legal and safety obligations. We are not collecting more than we need. We ask for the minimum information
title_zh: Claude在某些情况下可能需要进行身份验证
summary_zh: Anthropic公司宣布，在某些情况下使用其AI助手Claude时，可能需要用户完成身份验证。这一措施旨在负责任地管理强大技术，通过识别使用者来防止滥用、执行使用政策并履行法律义务。，身份验证将逐步针对特定使用场景推出。用户可能在访问某些功能、经历常规平台完整性检查或其他安全合规措施时，看到验证提示。Anthropic强调，验证数据仅用于确认用户身份，不作他用。，验证流程由合作伙伴Persona Identities提供技术支持。用户需要准备：1）有效的政府签发带照片实体身份证件（如护照、驾照、国民身份证）；2）带有摄像头的手机或电脑，可能需要实时自拍；3）约五分钟时间完成验证。不接受复印件、截图、数字ID或非政府机构证件。，在数据保护方面，Anthropic作为数据控制方设定使用规则和保留期限，Persona作为处理方在其指令下操作。用户的身份证件和自拍图像由Persona系统收集和存储，而非Anthropic自身系统。Anthropic仅在需要时（如审核申诉）通过Persona平台访问验证记录，但不复制或存储这些图像。，根据合同约束，Persona仅能将数据用于提供验证服务、支持防欺诈改进，并必须采用行业标准安全控制措施保护数据，在约定保留期限和法律要求下删除数据。所有传输和静态数据均经过加密处理。，Anthropic特别说明，身份数据不会用于训练AI模型，且遵循最小必要原则收集信息。详细隐私政策可在其帮助中心查阅。这一验证机制标志着AI服务提供商在平台安全与合规管理方面正在采取更具体的措施。

title: The Death of an AI Whistleblower
content: The Death of an AI Whistleblower | The Nation Log In Email * Password * Remember Me Forgot Your Password? Log In New to The Nation ? Subscribe Print subscriber? Activate your online access Feature / April 13, 2026 The Death of an AI Whistleblower Suchir Balaji sought to expose OpenAI’s data abuses. Did it come at the expense of his own life? Jacob Silverman Share Copy Link Facebook X (Twitter) Bluesky Pocket Email This article appears in the May 2026 issue , with the headline “The Death of an AI Whistleblower.” On October 23, 2024, Suchir Balaji’s face appeared , freshly shaved, boyish but serious, partially shadowed, in The New York Times as he announced himself as a whistleblower against one of the most powerful technology companies in the world. Setting off a political earthquake in the AI industry, Balaji claimed that OpenAI, the highly touted artificial-intelligence start-up where he’d worked as a researcher for almost four years, had broken copyright laws by absorbing practically all available data on the Internet for its models. ChatGPT, the company’s mega-popular AI chatbot—as well as, potentially, its competitors—had apparently been built on a foundation of illegal activity on a mass scale. Balaji presented his supporting argument in a mathematically minded paper on his personal website . “If you believe what I believe, you have to just leave the company,” Balaji told the Times ’ Cade Metz. OpenAI had a lot on the line, and so did Balaji. Other researchers had resigned from their positions and issued warnings about the dangers of AI going rogue in fantastical Terminator -like scenarios. But as the Times noted, Balaji was one of the few industry professionals flagging the damage that the technology was doing right now. A 26-year-old former top student at Berkeley, he was already a veteran of several AI labs and had a patent under his belt. His parents called him a humble prodigy who had taught himself programming at age 11. His future seemed boundless. Balaji didn’t live long enough to tell his full story. A month after the Times interview was published, Balaji was found dead in his San Francisco apartment with a gunshot wound to the head. In that brief interval, he had gone from obscure AI researcher to high-profile whistleblower under severe pressure as he defied an industry that was collectively engaged in the biggest speculative bet in American business history. Suchir Balaji’s time in the public eye amounted to one newspaper interview, but his afterlife as a martyr has become increasingly complex, his legacy contested terrain. The San Francisco medical examiner ruled his death a suicide, but his parents, Poornima Ramarao and Balaji Ramamurthy, have repeatedly stated that their son was murdered for what he knew . The dispute likely won’t be resolved to the satisfaction of Balaji’s parents or critics of the burgeoning AI industry anytime soon. Still, it tells us a great deal about the crisis of accountability in a sector of the AI indu
summary_zh: 2024年10月23日，前OpenAI研究员苏希尔·巴拉吉在《纽约时报》公开揭露公司大规模数据侵权行为，指控其为训练ChatGPT等模型非法抓取互联网几乎所有可用数据，严重违反版权法。这位26岁的伯克利高材生、拥有多项AI实验室经验及专利的研究员，在采访中直言“如果你相信我的发现，就必须离开公司”，其指控在AI行业引发政治地震。，巴拉吉的举报聚焦于AI技术当下造成的实际损害，而非遥远的科幻式风险，这使他区别于其他行业警告者。他在个人网站发布了以数学论证为基础的详细论文作为证据。，然而，公开举报一个月后，巴拉吉被发现在旧金山公寓中头部中弹身亡。旧金山法医办公室判定其为自杀，但其父母普尔尼玛·拉玛劳和巴拉吉·拉马穆尔提坚决反驳，坚信儿子是因掌握内幕而遭谋杀。他的猝死使其从一名普通研究员转变为承受巨大压力的高调举报者，其离世真相成为悬案，也使其身后形象复杂化——既是殉道者，其遗产也成为争议焦点。，此事件凸显了AI行业在迅猛发展中所面临的问责危机。巴拉吉的指控直指行业核心数据实践的法律与伦理边界，而其悲剧性结局进一步加剧了公众对AI巨头权力不受制约的深切担忧。此案至今未解，持续拷问着这个正处于美国商业史上最大规模投机热潮中的行业的透明度与责任。
